text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Trainer. Do you ever think about<n>how
wonderful hospital food is?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: It's low in sodium, calories, and it's easyto digest. And they do all this whiletrying to affect the flavor as little aspossible.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It's a shame that we can only eat such<n>food while
in the hospital. There's so<n>much we could learn
from it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
So I was thinking, I'd like to organize a<n>hospital
food party for some of my<n>closest friends. Would
you like to join?
